name: DetectTfmFromMarketplace
description: Detect the target framework moniker from the AL Language VS Code extension on the Visual Studio Marketplace
author: ALCops

inputs.name: channel
inputs.label: Extension Channel
inputs.helpMarkDown: Which channel of the AL Language extension to check

inputs.name: extensionVersion
inputs.label: Specific Extension Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Pin to a specific AL Language extension version (e.g., `15.0.12345.0`). Overrides channel.

outputVariables.name: tfm
outputVariables.description: The detected target framework moniker (e.g., net8.0, netstandard2.1)

outputVariables.name: extensionVersion
outputVariables.description: The resolved AL Language extension version

outputVariables.name: assemblyVersion
outputVariables.description: The assembly version of the CodeAnalysis DLL
